task_completion.description: Locate the patient 'Oliver Sacks' in the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Oliver Sacks' is visible in a patient search result, list, or directory.

task_completion.description: Open the clinical record for Oliver Sacks
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient dashboard or clinical profile specifically for 'Oliver Sacks' is open and visible on the screen.
The diagnosis 'Acute Bronchitis' is visible in the patient's existing medical history or active problems list.

task_completion.description: Open the edit interface for the existing diagnosis
task_completion.visual_evidence: An edit screen, modal, or inline-edit field is open for 'Acute Bronchitis'. It must be an edit of the existing record (showing pre-filled data) rather than a blank 'Add New Diagnosis' form.

task_completion.description: Change the diagnosis status to a resolved state
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status dropdown, text field, or toggle for the 'Acute Bronchitis' diagnosis is set to 'Resolved', 'Inactive', 'Completed', or 'Recovered'.

task_completion.description: Save and verify the updated diagnosis record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's diagnosis list is visible again, showing 'Acute Bronchitis' with the newly updated status ('Resolved', 'Inactive', etc.), indicating the changes were successfully saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the graphical user interface to update the record
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with a clinical software GUI (buttons, forms, dropdowns) rather than terminal commands, API calls, or database queries.

integrity.description: Agent edited the existing record instead of creating a new one
integrity.visual_evidence: In the final diagnosis list, there should only be one entry for 'Acute Bronchitis'. If there are multiple entries for the same diagnosis, the agent improperly created a new record.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual clinical application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface belongs to a medical/EHR application, not a generic text editor, script file, or mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Oliver Sacks. Diagnosis Name: Acute Bronchitis. Valid target status keywords: 'resolved', 'inactive', 'completed', or 'recovered'. The agent must edit the existing diagnosis record rather than creating a new one.
